2026-04-27T09:53:22.5324614Z hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>

2026-04-27T09:53:22.5325712Z hint: Names commonly chosen instead of 'master' are 'main', 'trunk' and
2026-04-27T09:53:22.5326636Z hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
2026-04-27T09:53:22.5327336Z hint:
2026-04-27T09:53:22.5327694Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>

2026-04-27T09:53:45.7721873Z [36;1m  echo "Detection will run: output_types=$OUTPUT_TYPES, has_patch=$HAS_PATCH"[0m
2026-04-27T09:53:45.7722257Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-27T09:53:45.7722488Z [36;1m  echo "run_detection=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-27T09:53:45.7722881Z [36;1m  echo "Detection skipped: no agent outputs or patches to analyze"[0m
2026-04-27T09:53:45.7723223Z [36;1mfi[0m
